studies.title:
A Randomised Controlled Trial of Oviva Direkt for Improvement of Lipid
Control in Patients Living with Dyslipidaemia

_verification.reason: The study is about 'Oviva Direkt Lipid', which is a different program from 'Oviva Direkt für Adipositas'. The focus is on lipid control in dyslipidemia, not on adiposity treatment.

studies.title: Randomised, controlled trial to evaluate the effectiveness of Oviva Direkt in reducing blood pressure in patients with hypertension

_verification.reason: The study is about 'Oviva Direkt Bluthochdruck', a different product from 'Oviva Direkt für Adipositas'. Although both are developed by Oviva, the study focuses on hypertension, not adiposity.

_verification.reason: The study is about 'Oviva Direkt Bluthochdruck', which is a different program focused on hypertension, not 'Oviva Direkt für Adipositas', which targets obesity. The intervention is specific to blood pressure management, not weight loss.

studies.title: A Randomised Controlled Trial of Oviva Direkt for Improvement of Glycaemic Control in Patients Living with Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (T2DM)

_verification.reason: The study is about 'Oviva Direkt Diabetes Typ 2', which is a different program from 'Oviva Direkt für Adipositas'. Although both are developed by Oviva AG, they target different conditions (Type 2 Diabetes vs. Adiposity).

studies.title: A prospective analysis of biocompatibility and retention behavior with directly printed retentionsplints after orthodontic therapy.

_verification.reason: The study is about the biocompatibility and retention behavior of directly printed retention splints after orthodontic therapy, not about the digital therapeutic product Oviva Direkt für Adipositas.
The study is about the Digital Diabetes Clinic (DDC), which is a different digital therapeutic product focused on diabetes care, not the Oviva Direkt für Adipositas which is for obesity treatment.

studies.title: Contextual factors influencing children's dietary behaviour - A randomised intervention study in gastronomy

_verification.reason: The study focuses on a public health intervention involving the redesign of children's menus in restaurants to influence dietary behavior, not on the digital therapeutic product Oviva Direkt für Adipositas.

studies.title: Multimodal home-based rehabilitation intervention after discharge from inpatient geriatric rehabilitation: a multi-center randomized controlled trial
